name: choir-redesign-hard-cutover-assets
scope: PromptSurface hard cutover, TetraMark, top/bottom DeskSheet, schema-v2 themes, app redesign guidance
hard_cutover_rules: Do not keep BottomBar.svelte as the implementation filename.
Do not keep bottom-only CSS variables/selectors in production code.
Update tests to the new PromptSurface selectors.
PromptSurface must support top and bottom placement.
